svg.title: Bridged Wi-Fi Talos worker architecture
svg.desc: Omni on the management NUC asks the provider on the Wi-Fi CachyOS host to create a Talos virtual machine. An ASUS media bridge presents Ethernet over Wi-Fi, the host and VM sit directly on the HomeLab VLAN, and Cilium tunnels cross-node pod traffic between node addresses.
